title: MinResource
text: MinResource The percentage of system resources that Uniface should try to leave available to other applications. MinResource = Percentage Arguments Percentage —any value between 10 and 90 Default value 70 File section [upi] Description The resources referred to are in the data segment of the USER module. When this percentage is reached, Uniface releases some resources before it allocates new ones; note that components are minimized automatically. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
